series_metadata.series_description: Ohio Revised Code Section 3737.23 states that the Fire Marshal shall keep in his office a record of all fires occurring in the state, the origin of such fire and all facts, statistics, and circumstances thereto. The reports are compiled and uploaded to the National Fire Incident Reporting System, maintained by the U.S. Fire Administration.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Maintain microform four years ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records ten years ; Paper: Maintain paper reports one year
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
